creator: kes-kes@yandex.ru
text:
make extract
===>  freeradius-1.1.8 conflicts with installed package(s):
      freeradius-2.1.3

      They install files into the same place.
      Please remove them first with pkg_delete(1).
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net/freeradius.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net/freeradius.

I just want to extract source files of previous version, I do not install it!

so I MUST NOT delete freeradius-2.1.3

Fix: 

Do not check conflicts until install stage (or may be build)
How-To-Repeat: try to extract port which is conflict with some other port
